creator: kris@hub.freebsd.org
text:
On Mon, 6 Dec 1999 rip@pinetec.co.za wrote:

> My port works perfectly, portlint finds nothing wrong with it, but
> ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming doesnt exist so I can submit it
> for your approval

The usual submission method is to attach it to a PR like this one.

Kris
